title: Let me bonemeal!!
description: This datapack adds the ability to duplicate plants that usually arent able to be bonemealed by combining them with bonemeal in a crafting grid
body:
This datapack does 1 simple thing
It allows you to duplicate plants that usually cant be bonemealed by combining them with bonemeal in a crafting grid. At this moment, this datapack allows you to duplicate:
- All 1 block tall flowers
- Vines
- Cactus
- Sugar Cane
